start:
Welcome to AI House Planner! 🏠

I will create your dream house plan using AI.

/generate - Create new house plan
/history - Previous projects
/help - Help
help:
📋 BOT COMMANDS:

/start - Start
/generate - Create new house plan
/history - Previous projects
/help - Help

💡 Tip: The more details you provide, the better the AI result!
ask_area:
📐 What is the total area of the house? (in m²)

Example: 120
ask_floors:
🏗 How many floors do you want?

Example: 1 or 2
ask_bedrooms:
🛏 How many bedrooms do you need?

Example: 3
ask_extra:
✏️ Any additional requirements? (optional)

Example: 'large kitchen', 'garage', 'pool'

Or type /skip
generating:
⏳ AI is generating your house plan...

Please wait, this may take 15-30 seconds.
error: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
no_history:
📭 No saved projects yet.

Use /generate to create a new project!
